text:
*[Bug 18989] Wishlist: provide conversion of POSIXlt time zone retaining sub-second accuracy*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=18989>

--- Comment #18 from Martin Maechler (<mailto:maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch|maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch>) ---
(In reply to Suharto Anggono from comment #16)

Thank you, Suharto. Indeed, the differences you explored and summarized here
are very useful to me,  and revealing of the effects.

I'm no exploring these, notably with the  "floor sec before as.POSIXct"
change to R-devel you had proposed.

I will get back here within a few days I hope.

text:
*[Bug 19054] New: all(<symbol>) can lead to ASAN error (out-of-bounds read)*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19054>

            Bug ID: 19054
           Summary: all(<symbol>) can lead to ASAN error (out-of-bounds
                    read)
           Product: R
           Version: R-devel (trunk)
          Hardware: Other
                OS: Linux
            Status: NEW
          Severity: normal
          Priority: P5
         Component: Low-level
          Assignee: <mailto:R-core@R-project.org|R-core@R-project.org>
          Reporter: <mailto:kevinushey@gmail.com|kevinushey@gmail.com>

Created attachment 3678
  --> <https://bugs.r-project.org/attachment.cgi?id=3678&action=edit>
Candidate patch.

The source of this issue appears to be the assumption that `coerceVector(t,
LGLSXP)` must return a `LGLSXP` vector in logic.c#486, but that instead emits a
warning while returning `R_NilValue`.

I've attached a patch that fixes this specific issue, but I think it's worth
considering whether `coerceVector()` ought to emit an error rather than (or, in
addition to?) a warning when unable to coerce to the requested type, since a
substantial amount of C code proceeds with the assumption that `coerceVector()`
was successful.

To reproduce, it should suffice to use something like `all(quote(x))` in a
version of R built with ASAN; alternatively, a quick way to test with Docker
is:

```
$ docker run -it rocker/r-devel-ubsan-clang RD -s -e "print(R.version);
all(quote(x))"
               _

csu/../sysdeps/nptl/libc_start_call_main.h:58:16
```
